They then used vSphere Client to rename the powered-off TE-DC-MD-NC-02 VM to TE-DC-MD-NC-02-DONT-TURNON and briefly checked the unresponsive console of another VM, TE-DC-MD-NC-02.1.",

analysis.summary: The technician first inspected Docker container statuses on a VM named TE-DC-MD-NC-02, noting several unhealthy Nextcloud AIO containers. They then used vSphere Client to rename the powered-off TE-DC-MD-NC-02 VM to TE-DC-MD-NC-02-DONT-TURNON and briefly checked the unresponsive console of another VM, TE-DC-MD-NC-02.1.
actions_taken: Inspected Docker container statuses on TE-DC-MD-NC-02 using `sudo docker ps`.
Accessed vSphere Client for virtual machine management.
Navigated to the TE-DC-MD-NC-02 VM within vSphere.
Renamed the powered-off TE-DC-MD-NC-02 VM to TE-DC-MD-NC-02-DONT-TURNON.
Checked the web console and summary for TE-DC-MD-NC-02.1 VM.
issues_observed: Three Docker containers (`nextcloud-aio-nextcloud`, `nextcloud-aio-notify-push`, `nextcloud-aio-all-in-one-latest`) on TE-DC-MD-NC-02 were reported as 'unhealthy'.
The TE-DC-MD-NC-02.1 VM console displayed a black/unresponsive screen.
An alert indicated that 'VMware Tools is not installed' on TE-DC-MD-NC-02.1.
notable_events: Renaming a VM with 'DONT-TURNON' clearly indicates a specific operational instruction or status for that VM.
Observation of unhealthy Docker containers on TE-DC-MD-NC-02 before its renaming.

tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician worked methodically, quickly navigating to the required interfaces and performing the VM rename without hesitation. The initial Docker check was also direct.
